title: Inbound Message Sync Flow
interaction_flow: SyncEngine._scheduleInbound(delayMs): sets setTimeout, then invokes inbound.pull()
InboundSync.pull() → Hub: POST /a2a/mailbox/inbound  body={sender_id, proxy_protocol_version, cursor, limit}  timeout=35s
InboundSync.pull() → MailboxStore.setCursor('evomap-hub:inbound_cursor', next_cursor)  [if next_cursor present, persists to state.json]
SyncEngine._scheduleInbound: if result.received > 0 → updates _lastActivity, calls onInboundReceived(result.received)
InboundSync.ackDelivered() → MailboxStore.list({type:'%', direction:'inbound', status:'delivered', limit:100}) filtered by channel
InboundSync.ackDelivered(): if delivered.length > 0 → MailboxStore.getState('node_id'), POST /a2a/mailbox/ack  body={sender_id, message_ids:[]}  timeout=10s
SyncEngine._scheduleInbound(): reschedules — IDLE (>5min no activity) → 60s interval, ACTIVE → 10s interval
auth_error_flow: Hub returns 401 or 403 → InboundSync.pull() throws AuthError
key_relationships: SyncEngine composes OutboundSync (instantiated in constructor, not in this flow)
SyncEngine depends_on MailboxStore (passed via constructor, shared with InboundSync)
InboundSync depends_on MailboxStore (read cursor/state, write inbound batch, list delivered)
InboundSync depends_on Hub HTTP API (POST /a2a/mailbox/inbound, POST /a2a/mailbox/ack)

SyncEngine.constructor: ({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger, onInboundReceived, onAuthError })

InboundSync.pull: async (channel='evomap-hub', limit=50) → { received: number, cursor: string } | { received: 0, error: string }
InboundSync.ackDelivered: async (channel='evomap-hub') → { acked: number } | { acked: 0, error: string }

MailboxStore.writeInbound: ({ id, type, payload, channel, priority, refId, expiresAt }) → msgId: string
MailboxStore.list: ({ type, direction, status, limit, offset }) → message[]
MailboxStore.ack: (messageIds: string[]) → count: number [sets status='delivered', evicts from index]

important_notes: Polling interval: 10s when active, 60s when idle (no activity for >5 min)
Initial inbound poll fires after 1000ms from start()
Pull uses cursor-based pagination; cursor persisted in state.json
Messages written to JSONL (messages.jsonl) with status='pending' on arrival
ackDelivered() only ACKs messages already in 'delivered' status — consumer must call store.ack() separately to promote pending→delivered before ackDelivered runs
PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION = '0.1.0' sent in pull request body
onInboundReceived callback is fired with count of newly received messages — used by upstream to trigger processing
